_doc: Batch-1 designed-experiment feature matrix. One 7-dimension vector per video (see experiment/DESIGN.md). Built + reconciled with the per-city configs by the producer 2026-07-20. Every on-screen NUMBER was independently re-verified from data/<slug>/normalized before this assignment (hook/punchline endpoints checked against trend.json for all 20). This file is the experiment RECORD and the production SPEC for the remaining engine work + the batch-1 re-render wave.

D1_trendStyle.status: LIVE — read from each config's trendStyle; engine FullTrend supports all five
D1_trendStyle.tests: which chart form holds attention on the long arc

D2_hookStyle.status: TARGET — only 'stat' (HookOpen shock-number) is built today; 'question' + 'zoom' cold-open variants are an OPEN engine dim (see engineDependencies). Cities assigned question/zoom render 'stat' until that lands.

D3_storyFrame.status: DESCRIPTIVE + HONEST — the arc the data actually shows and the video's hook/spine emphasizes; NOT a free knob (never relabel a video's frame to fill the grid). See honestyShortfalls.

D4_paletteFamily.status: DESCRIPTIVE — impressionistic family label over each config's city-true palette; the hue itself stays city-true (honesty note: palette never encodes data)

D5_musicFamily.status: SPEC — groups the identity-plan per-city SAO vibe+seed into families. Drives music generation (12 batch-1 wavs NOT yet generated — see engineDependencies).

D6_durationSec.status: TARGET — all 20 configs are 330 today. The 270 tight-cut needs the phases-from-config engine dim (OPEN). Cities marked 270 stay 330 until that lands.

D7_mapEmphasis.status: TARGET — the explicit points/heat toggle is an OPEN engine dim. Today each city renders a fixed default that already leans the assigned way per its data (e.g. no-coord Grand Rapids is heat-forward by construction). The toggle formalizes it.

detroit-mi.nearTwin: ANCHOR (steps+zoom long-fall corner; shares steps w/ buffalo/cincinnati, zoom w/ dallas/atlanta)

charlotte-nc.nearTwin: ANCHOR (area+question+geography corner; shares geography-shift w/ seattle, question w/ memphis/buffalo)

memphis-tn.nearTwin: atlanta-ga (share D1 stacked + D3 composition-shift; diff 4 otherwise — the composition-shift pair)

atlanta-ga.nearTwin: memphis-tn (share D1 stacked + D3 composition-shift; diff 4 otherwise)

buffalo-ny.nearTwin: ANCHOR (steps+question+rebound corner; shares rebound-and-retreat w/ denver/dc, steps w/ detroit/cincinnati, question w/ charlotte/memphis)

cincinnati-oh.nearTwin: ANCHOR (steps+270 long-fall corner; shares steps w/ detroit/buffalo, jazz w/ philly/baltimore/kc/memphis)

kansas-city-mo.nearTwin: baltimore-md (diff 2: D4,D5); nashville-tn (diff 2: D6,D7); chicago-il (diff 2: D1,D5)

cleanNearTwinPairs.isolates: D5 musicFamily (cinematic-strings vs electronic-pulse) — everything else identical: the cleanest music A/B in the batch
D3 storyFrame (long-fall vs rebound-and-retreat) — everything else identical: the cleanest narrative-arc A/B
D6 durationSec + D7 mapEmphasis on an otherwise-identical warm long-fall bars video
D4 paletteFamily + D5 musicFamily on long-fall bars
D1 trendStyle + D5 musicFamily on a warm long-fall
D2 hookStyle (zoom vs stat) + D4 on lollipop long-fall

the composition-shift pair — share the two DEFINING levels (D1 stacked, D3 composition-shift); vary D2/D4/D5/D7. Not a clean 1-2 twin, but the only two composition videos, so they anchor that cell together.

cornerAnchors.note: These four have no full-vector twin at diff<=2 — they are deliberately multi-dimensionally unique to explore feature-space corners. Each still shares EVERY one of its levels with >=2 siblings, so every LEVEL remains attributable via the clean pairs above even though the whole-vector twin is >2.

honestyShortfalls.principle: Honesty invariants override the experiment grid (DESIGN.md). D3 storyFrame is the arc the DATA shows and the video's hook/spine emphasizes; it is never relabeled to balance the grid. D1 'stacked' is semantically bound to composition stories (its bands only mean something when composition is the point).

D3_geography-shift.reason: Only two batch-1 cities genuinely lead on a neighborhood-reshuffle arc (Seattle: Capitol Hill overtook Downtown as #1; Charlotte: flat citywide but divisions diverge, University City +17% vs Airport -33%). The other 18 lead on a trend arc. Not backfilled to 3 — that would mean mislabeling a trend-led video's frame.
D3_geography-shift.batch2Action: Deliberately source cities with a dominant geographic-divergence story to reach >=3.

D3_composition-shift.reason: Only Memphis (motor-vehicle-theft property wave) and Atlanta (society-category recording step, disclosed) genuinely lead on a category-composition arc. Same honesty rule as above.
D3_composition-shift.batch2Action: Source cities with a clear category-mix shift to reach >=3.

D1_stacked.reason: The stacked chart exists to show WHAT category changed; it is only honest/legible when composition is the story. Exactly the two composition-shift cities use it, so stacked==composition-shift==2 by design, not by omission.

engineDependencies.note: Dimensions marked TARGET above require these OPEN engine dims to LAND before the affected cities render; until then those cities fall back to the built default (documented per-city). All 20 re-render together once these + the MethodDiagram standing feature are in (the batch-1 re-render wave).

D2_hookStyle_variants.need: HookOpen 'question' (quiz-first cold open) + 'zoom' (map-first cold open) variants

D6_270_tight_cut.need: phases-from-config so a 270s cut re-times phases (not a squished 330 timeline)

configReconciliation.note: Only ONE config field was changed to satisfy the grid; every on-screen NUMBER is unchanged and re-verified.
configReconciliation.cincinnati-oh: trendStyle area -> steps (D1 steps 2->3; cincinnati is a corner anchor so no clean pair breaks; steps suits its clean -45% long fall; engine-supported; unrendered so no re-render cost). Logged in DECISIONS.md as a taste call.
configReconciliation.unchanged: All other 19 configs keep their identity-plan trendStyle. Baltimore kept 'bars' (not moved to steps) specifically to preserve the clean baltimore<->kansas-city palette/music near-twin.
